dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, things have gotten worse since you helped us {quest_action}. I had hoped the worst was behind us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} discovered that the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} regrouping near the {quest_focus}. The {enemy_type} have been spotted {location_hint}, and the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} still at risk.
dialogueChunks.outro: We cannot let them undo everything you have done for us. Please, help us again.

dialogueChunks.intro: I wish I had better news, {player_name}. Your efforts to {quest_action} bought us time, but not enough.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Something is driving the {quest_threat} to act with new desperation. {quest_ally} thinks there may be a source: a nest or camp {location_hint}. If we do not deal with it, the {quest_stakes} will suffer all over again.
dialogueChunks.outro: Find whatever is behind this and put a stop to it.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I know you have already done so much. But the {quest_threat} struck again last night, harder than before.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They came straight for the {quest_focus}. The {quest_stakes} barely escaped. {quest_ally} says the {enemy_type} are being organized by something smarter: there are tracks leading {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we do not act now, everything we have rebuilt will be lost.
